rulings.Case Title: JON DOE JR VS. CHARLES AKHIDNEOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandate Against Frank Perez Only, Ordering Him To Response In Writing To The Reasonable Accommodation Form Of 10/18/13
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 1. PLAINTIFF JON DOE's Motion For Writ Of Mandate Against Frank Perez Only, Ordering Him To Respond In Writing To The Reasonable Accommodation Form Of 10/18/13 DENIED as moot. The San Francisco Housing Authority issued a decision on Petitioner's request for a reasonable accommodation on November 8, 2013. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: BRIGID CRILLY, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO MARIE FIRL VS. ANGELA THOMAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 2. DEFENDANT ANGELA THOMAS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED as to all claims of uncertainty. The Court takes judicial notice of the First Amended Complaint ("FAC") and any attached exhibits. The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the First cause of action ("COA") for breach of contract, Third COA for common counts, and failure to successfully plead successor-in-interest status. The demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the Second COA for declaratory relief. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 3. DEFENDANTS LARRY WEI and FONG CHIENG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff's complaint is uncertain as none of the supporting documents reference Defendants Wei and Chieng as owners or landlords of the subject premises. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ELEONOR SABALVARO et al VS. REYNALDO P RODRIGUEZ
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANTS ELEONOR SABALVARO and LORNA WONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT CONTINUED to November 14, 2014. Plaintiffs failed to attach a copy of the first amended complaint to their demurrer and motion to strike. See SF Local Rules 2.6C. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ELEONOR SABALVARO et al VS. REYNALDO P RODRIGUEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Cross-Complaint Of Reynaldo P. Rodriguez For Damages
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANTS LORNA RODRIGUEZ WONG and ELEONOR SABALVARO A.K.A. ELEONOR S. LIBBON's Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Cross-Complaint Of Reynaldo P. Rodriguez For Damages CONTINUED to November 14, 2014. Plaintiffs failed to attach a copy of the first amended complaint to their demurrer and motion to strike. See SF Local Rules 2.6C. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: RWW PROPERTIES , LLC VS. ZHEN ZHEN YU FANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFF RWW PROPERTIES , LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Hearing required on Plaintiff RWW Properties, LLC's Motion for Summary Judgment. The Court orders Plaintiff to provide proof of service of the notice of default and notice of trustee's sale. The Court orders Defendant Chang to appear to testify to improper service of the notice of default and notice of trustee's sale. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: RWW PROPERTIES, LLC VS. CYRUS LAFARRA
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 6. PLAINTIFF RWW PROPERTIES, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence to show it is entitled to the judgment as a matter of law on the unlawful detainer action. As such, Plaintiff has shifted the burden. Defendants did not file an opposition. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: JOEL ELLIOTT VS. MICHAEL GALLIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL GALLIN and AARON MARXMILLER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Gallin and Marxmiller's unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Defendants have demonstrated a defense to Plaintiff's unlawful detainer action by showing that the three day notice violated California Code of Civil Procedure Section 1924.4(a). = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: RAINER GEISSLER VS. JAMES R QUEDADO
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 8. DEFENDANT JAMES QUEDADO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to November 14, 2014. Plaintiff filed an opposition to the Demurrer but failed to provide Department 501 with courtesy copies of their opposition. See SF Local Rules 2.6B. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN MCGUIRK VS. BARBARA HAUGHT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses; For Order Finding Waiver Of Objection And For Monetary Sanctions And To To Continue The Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 31, 2014 line 9. PLAINTIFF CARMEN MCGUIRK's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; For Order Finding Waiver Of Objection And For Monetary Sanctions And To Continue The Trial Date Hearing required on Plaintiff McGuirk's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses. The Court orders Ms. James and Ms. Haught to appear and be prepared to give testimony on the issue of service of Plaintiff's discovery requests. = (501/LOT)
